lyrics.title: Heartbeat
lyrics.content:
I know you told so many times
So many words in different rhymes
But I don't feel the same

I wasn't innocent, I know
And things I did for sure were wrong
The time has passed so long

Feeling your heartbeat
That's what I want
That's what I need
Feeling again that you're breathing with me

I'm getting wild when I'm alone
I learned by heart you're not my own
But I never asked you to belong

You're my desire and my pain
But all battles are in vain
You mean more than anything to me

Feeling your heartbeat
That's what I want
That's what I need
Feeling again that you're breathing with me

Feeling your heartbeat
That's what I want
That's what I need
Feeling again that you're breathing with me

You're the one that I need
You're the air that I breathe
Don't throw my heart away
I want you to stay

Feeling your heartbeat
That's what I want
That's what I need
Feeling again that you're breathing with me

Feeling your heartbeat
That's what I want
That'ѕ what I need
Feeling again that you're breathing with me

Feeling your heartbeаt

lyrics.title: Sirdspukstus
lyrics.content:
Es zinu, tu teici vairākkārt
Daudz vārdu citādās atskaņās
Bet es nejūtos tāpat

Es nebiju nevainīgs, es zinu
Un lietas, ko darīju, patiesi bija nepareizas
Tik daudz laika ir aizgājis

Just tavus sirdspukstus
Tas ir tas, ko es gribu
Tas ir tas, ko man vajag
Just vēlreiz, ka elpojam kopā

Es kļūstu mežonīgs, kad esmu viens
Es iemācījos no galvas, ka neesi mana
Bet es nekad nelūdzu Tev būt manai

Tu esi mana kāre un mana sāpe
Bet visas cīņas ir veltīgas
Tu man nozīmē vairāk nekā jebkas

Just tavus sirdspukstus
Tas ir tas, ko es gribu
Tas ir tas, ko man vajag
Just vēlreiz, ka elpojam kopā

Just tavus sirdspukstus
Tas ir tas, ko es gribu
Tas ir tas, ko man vajag
Just vēlreiz, ka elpojam kopā

Tu esi vienīgā, kas man ir vajadzīga
Tu esi gaiss, ko es elpoju
Nemet manu sirdi prom
Es vēlos, lai paliec

Just tavus sirdspukstus
Tas ir tas, ko es gribu
Tas ir tas, ko man vajag
Just vēlreiz, ka elpojam kopā

Just tavus sirdspukstus
Tas ir tas, ko es gribu
Tas ir tas, ko man vajag
Just vēlreiz, ka elpojam kopā

Just tаvus sirdspukstuѕ
